Background Intelligent Transfer Service.description: Transfers files in the background using idle network bandwidth.

Distributed Link Tracking Client.description: Maintains links between NTFS files within a computer or across computers in a network.

Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol Service.description: Provides support for the Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol (SSTP) for VPN connections.

SSDP Discovery.description: Discovers devices and services on a network using the Simple Service Discovery Protocol (SSDP).

Telephony.description: Provides telephony services for applications that use the Telephony API (TAPI).

Update Orchestrator Service.description: Manages the installation of Windows updates and patches.
